creator: draco@marino.st
text:
On 7/1/2013 15:50, Eric Crist wrote:
> Please see ports/180167 for the resolution.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=180167

Okay thanks!
I think you could have just responded to this PR with a patch though to 
avoid the confusion of now tracking two PRs.  (e.g. the patch to update 
*is* the maintainer response).

it's hard to track 1500 open PRs...
john
